title: PROSPERITY PROGRAM - 211info
text: GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT PROSPERITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Goodwill offers assistance with money management, debt reduction, budget planning, and connections to community support programs and financial services. Also offers employment-focused Individual Development Accounts (IDA), which include financial education courses and five to one savings matching opportunities for post-secondary education, transportation to employment, assistive technology such as mobility aids, dental work, and hearing aids, emergency savings, and debt reduction. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 431-3307 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 431-3307 Trysta Duquette [email protected] Other (541) 431-3311 Dyana Kirchner [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Varies by location Services: Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB CONNECTIONS EMPLOYMENT - VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
